creator: tmclaugh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

Suspending PR for time being since I'll habndle this with the eventual 
update to 1.7.0.  I'm still not sure how I want this to work but since 
an update to 1.7.0 requires some manual intervention for LDAP to work 
I'm happy to change things.  (Actually, I think using ldap.conf instead 
of nss_ldap.conf in the nss_ldap port is the correct fix. :)
